VivekPatel.

Data Analyst
Finding signal in the noise — and knowing when there isn't any

There's a version of data analysis that produces convincing-looking outputs and tells stakeholders what they want to hear. I'm not interested in that version. I'm interested in the one that holds up.

View Projects → LinkedIn ↗ GitHub ↗
01 — About

Self-taught. Evidence-driven.

I didn't take the traditional route into this field. I took the one that made sense to me — certifications over degrees, projects over theory, questions over answers. My work reflects that. It's documented, reproducible, and honest about what it can and cannot support.

My certification stack spans Google, Microsoft, and Macquarie University, all delivered through Coursera. Every project I build goes end-to-end: environment setup, data ingestion, cleaning, exploratory analysis, and stakeholder-ready output — with every decision and known limitation documented along the way.

I'm drawn to problems where the data is messy, the scope is ambiguous, and the temptation to overclaim is real. That's where careful analytical thinking creates the most value.

"What we observe is not nature itself, but nature exposed to our method of questioning."
— Werner Heisenberg
02 — Work

Projects

Complete
01 · Descriptive Analytics
FIFA 23 Talent Distribution Analysis
Football Operations Domain

End-to-end analysis of how FIFA 23 player ratings distribute across leagues, clubs, and positions — SQL-first pipeline, pre-committed cross-validation, and explicit governance boundaries to prevent overclaiming on game-derived data.

PythonDuckDB / SQL PandasMatplotlib ExcelGitHub CI
View on GitHub↗
In Progress
02 · Descriptive & Prescriptive Analytics
Data Analyst Job Market Analysis
Labour Market Domain

Mixed descriptive and prescriptive analysis of the current data analyst job market — skill demand patterns, salary distributions by region and experience, and concrete recommendations for early-career analysts on where to focus.

PythonSQL TableauExcel Pandas
Repository available on completion→
